description: Refactor EditorView to use state components instead of strings
steps: Import EmptyState, LoadingState, ErrorState components
Replace displayContent() string logic with conditional component rendering
When !activeTab && tabs.length === 0, render EmptyState instead of CodeEditor
When loading, render LoadingState instead of CodeEditor
When error, render ErrorState instead of CodeEditor
Ensure CodeEditor only renders when content is available
Update EditorView.test.tsx to test new rendering logic

description: Add content field to mockEditorTabs in mockEditorData.ts
steps: Add optional 'content?: string' field to EditorTab type in src/features/editor/types/index.ts
Update mockEditorTabs in mockEditorData.ts to include content from mockEditorFiles
Map tab-1 (UserCard.tsx) to mockEditorFiles[0].content
Map tab-2 (useDebounce.ts) to mockEditorFiles[1].content
Map tab-3 (formatters.ts) to mockEditorFiles[2].content

description: Update useFileContent hook to support fallback content from tabs
steps: Modify EditorView to pass activeTab.content as fallback to displayContent logic
When file service fails/returns null, use tab.content if available
Preserve existing file service loading for explorer-opened files
Update tests to verify fallback content works for default tabs

description: Reposition ContextPanel reopen button to top-right edge
steps: Update button position from 'right-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2' to 'right-0 top-14'
Change width to 'w-6' or 'w-8', height to 'h-10' or 'h-12'
Add 'rounded-l-lg' (flush right edge)

Add ghost border: 'border-l border-y border-outline-variant/10'
Change icon to 'chevron_left' pointing left
Add slide-in transition when panel closes
Verify aria-label='Open context panel' exists
Update ContextPanel.test.tsx to verify new button position and styles

Verify CodeEditor is not rendered
Verify line numbers/gutter are not shown

Add test: 'renders LoadingState while file is loading'

Verify LoadingState is visible
Verify CodeEditor is not rendered

description: Add integration test for error state rendering
steps: Create or update EditorView.test.tsx

Verify CodeEditor is not rendered

Verify no 'No file selected' message appears for default tabs

Run 'npm run type-check' and ensure zero errors
Run 'npm run format:check' and ensure it passes

steps: Run 'npm run test' and ensure all tests pass

Add tests for any uncovered code paths
Re-run tests to confirm

Check dist/ output exists and is valid

Compare ContextPanel button against design reference

1. Empty state shows polished icon+text (not code text)
2. Default tabs show file content on load
